mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is already near zero and CPIAUCSL keeps rising, markets infer future reflation and a larger term premium. That combination pushes the 10-year Treasury yield higher over the next 20 trading days because inflation expectations outrun the policy-rate floor.
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day yield changes are not positive when FEDFUNDS is below 0.5 and CPIAUCSL is rising year-over-year, or if the sign turns negative in more than 60% of such episodes.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in UNRATE above its recent trend signals weakening labor demand and lower expected inflation, which lowers the 10-year Treasury yield over the next 20 trading days through a growth-slowdown channel.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations are followed by higher 10-year yields in a majority of cases, or if 20-day yield changes are not lower than baseline after UNRATE crosses the threshold.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous improvement in RSAFS and HOUST indicates strengthening domestic demand and tighter resource use. That demand re-acceleration raises the 10-year Treasury yield over the next 20 trading days by increasing growth and inflation expectations.
failure_condition: Reject if joint upturns in RSAFS and HOUST do not precede positive 20-day yield changes, or if either series alone explains the effect without the interaction.

mechanism_narrative: In manufacturing expansion regimes, rising INDPRO signals stronger real activity and less spare capacity. That combination steepens expected inflation pressure and pushes the 10-year Treasury yield higher over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO strength above the threshold is not followed by higher yields in the next 5 trading days, or if the effect reverses in expansion episodes.

mechanism_narrative: A hike in FEDFUNDS after a long pause tightens expected policy through the short end and lifts term premium uncertainty, which raises the 10-year Treasury yield over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS increases by >= 25 bps in the latest monthly reading
failure_condition: Reject if post-hike 5-day and 20-day yield changes are not positive on average, or if the sign is negative in most hike episodes.

mechanism_narrative: When PAYEMS growth is weak while UNRATE is rising, the labor market is losing momentum and discounting pressure on future inflation falls. That combination lowers the 10-year Treasury yield over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint weak-payrolls/rising-unemployment condition does not correspond to lower forward yield changes, or if either series alone reproduces the signal equally well.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in GDPC1 over the prior quarter signals slower aggregate demand and weaker inflation pressure. Over the following 60 trading days, that mechanism pulls the 10-year Treasury yield lower as growth expectations are revised down.
failure_condition: Reject if quarterly GDPC1 contractions are not followed by lower 60-day yield changes, or if the signal loses predictive sign consistency across multiple quarters.

mechanism_narrative: In a weak-demand regime with elevated UNRATE and subdued PAYEMS, even modest gains in RSAFS and HOUST point to a cyclical bottoming process that lifts inflation expectations. That interaction raises the 10-year Treasury yield over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the combined weak-labor-plus-improving-demand pattern does not precede higher yields, or if the effect disappears when UNRATE is not elevated.
